<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>Nimi Threads – Handmade Crochet Pieces</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Lato:wght@300;400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  :root {
    --cream: #FAF6EF;
    --warm-brown: #6B3E1F;
    --soft-tan: #C8A882;
    --muted-rust: #A8653A;
    --dark-earth: #3D2310;
    --light-sage: #D4CFC0;
    --off-white: #F2EDE3;
    --text-main: #2E1A0E;
    --text-muted: #7A5C3E;
    --gold: #C9A84C;
  }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; background: var(--cream); color: var(--text-main); }

  /* NAV */
  nav {m background-image: color: align-self: top: font-size: 566 ;;;;
    background: var(--dark-earth);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 1rem 4rem; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100;
  }
  .nav-logo img { height: 52px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: contain; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--light-sage); text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
  .nav-order {
    background: var(--muted-rust); color: #fff; padding: 0.55rem 1.3rem;
    font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-order:hover { background: var(--warm-brown); }

  /* HERO */
  .hero {
    min-height: 90vh; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-left {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
    padding: 5rem 3.5rem 5rem 5rem; position: relative;
  }
  .hero-leaf {
    position: absolute; top: 2rem; left: 2rem; opacity: 0.12; font-size: 5rem;
  }
  .hero-tag {
    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem;
  }
  .hero-tag::before, .hero-tag::after {
    content: '♡'; font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--soft-tan);
  }
  .hero-logo { max-width: 320px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .hero-tagline {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.1rem; font-style: italic; color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-bottom: 1.8rem; line-height: 1.7;
  }
  .hero-tagline em { color: var(--warm-brown); font-style: normal; font-weight: 700; }
  .hero-desc {
    font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.9; color: var(--text-muted);
    max-width: 380px; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; font-weight: 300;
  }
  .hero-cta { display: flex; gap: 1rem; }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--warm-brown); color: #fff; padding: 0.85rem 2rem;
    text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--dark-earth); }
  .btn-outline {
    background: transparent; color: var(--warm-brown); padding: 0.85rem 2rem;
    text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid var(--warm-brown); cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s; display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { background: var(--warm-brown); color: #fff; }

  .hero-right { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .hero-right img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: top center;
  }
  .hero-right-overlay {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(61,35,16,0.55));
    padding: 2rem;
  }
  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(61,35,16,0.85); color: var(--soft-tan);
    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem; border: 1px solid var(--gold);
  }

  /* DIVIDER */
  .stitch-divider {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.8rem; padding: 0 5rem; margin: 2.5rem 0;
  }
  .stitch-line { flex: 1; border-top: 1.5px dashed var(--soft-tan); }
  .stitch-icon { color: var(--gold); font-size: 1rem; }

  /* PRODUCTS */
  .products-section { background: var(--off-white); padding: 5rem 5rem; }
  .products-header {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }
  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.28em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2.3rem;
    color: var(--dark-earth); line-height: 1.2;
  }
  .products-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.8rem; }
  .product-card {
    background: var(--cream); border: 1px solid #ddd5c3; overflow: hidden;
    transition: transform 0.25s, box-shadow 0.25s; cursor: pointer;
  }
  .product-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); box-shadow: 0 14px 36px rgba(60,30,10,0.14); }
  .product-img { height: 240px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; }
  .product-img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.4s; }
  .product-card:hover .product-img img { transform: scale(1.04); }
  .product-badge {
    position: absolute; top: 1rem; left: 1rem;
    background: var(--warm-brown); color: #fff;
    font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem;
  }
  .product-info { padding: 1.3rem; }
  .product-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.15rem;
    color: var(--dark-earth); margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  .product-material {
    font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-muted); letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    margin-bottom: 0.9rem; font-weight: 300;
  }
  .product-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
  .product-price { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--warm-brown); }
  .add-btn {
    font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
    background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--warm-brown); color: var(--warm-brown);
    padding: 0.42rem 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .add-btn:hover { background: var(--warm-brown); color: #fff; }

  /* PRICING */
  .pricing-section { padding: 5rem 5rem; }
  .pricing-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 3rem; }
  .pricing-card {
    background: var(--off-white); border: 1px solid #ddd5c3;
    padding: 1.8rem; display: flex; gap: 1.4rem; align-items: flex-start;
    transition: box-shadow 0.2s;
  }
  .pricing-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(60,30,10,0.1); }
  .pricing-icon {
    font-size: 2rem; min-width: 2.5rem; text-align: center;
    color: var(--soft-tan); line-height: 1;
  }
  .pricing-name {
    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  .pricing-amount {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.5rem;
    color: var(--warm-brown); margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }
  .pricing-note { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.6; }
  .pricing-custom {
    grid-column: 1 / -1; background: var(--dark-earth); color: #fff; padding: 2rem;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 2rem; align-items: center;
  }
  .pricing-custom h3 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.5rem;
    color: var(--soft-tan); margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }
  .pricing-custom p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--light-sage); line-height: 1.7; font-weight: 300; }
  .custom-factors { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }
  .custom-factors li {
    font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--light-sage); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
  }
  .custom-factors li::before { content: '♡'; color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.7rem; }

  /* ORDER DETAILS */
  .order-section { background: var(--off-white); padding: 4rem 5rem; }
  .order-steps { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2rem; margin-top: 2.5rem; }
  .order-step {
    text-align: center; padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
    background: var(--cream); border: 1px solid #ddd5c3;
  }
  .order-step-icon { font-size: 2.2rem; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; color: var(--warm-brown); }
  .order-step h4 {
    font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark-earth);
    letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  .order-step p { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.6; }

  /* WHY */
  .why-section {
    padding: 5rem 5rem; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: center;
  }
  .features-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2rem; margin-top: 2rem; }
  .feature-item { display: flex; gap: 1.3rem; align-items: flex-start; }
  .feature-num {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2.2rem;
    color: var(--soft-tan); line-height: 1; min-width: 2.2rem;
  }
  .feature-text h4 { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark-earth); margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
  .feature-text p { font-size: 0.83rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.7; font-weight: 300; }
  .why-image { position: relative; }
  .why-image img { width: 100%; height: 500px; object-fit: cover; object-position: top; }
  .why-stamp {
    position: absolute; bottom: -1.5rem; right: -1.5rem;
    background: var(--dark-earth); color: var(--soft-tan);
    width: 110px; height: 110px; border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    text-align: center; border: 2px solid var(--gold);
  }
  .why-stamp span:first-child { font-size: 0.58rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .why-stamp span:last-child { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-style: italic; margin-top: 0.2rem; }

  /* CONTACT */
  .contact-section { background: var(--dark-earth); padding: 5rem; }
  .contact-section .section-title { color: var(--soft-tan); }
  .contact-section .section-label { color: var(--gold); }
  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem; margin-top: 3rem; }
  .contact-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(200,168,130,0.25);
    padding: 2rem; display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; align-items: flex-start;
  }
  .contact-icon { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--gold); }
  .contact-label {
    font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--light-sage); margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  .contact-value {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.4rem; color: var(--soft-tan); margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
  }
  .contact-sub { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--light-sage); font-weight: 300; }
  .whatsapp-btn {
    display: inline-block; margin-top: 3rem;
    background: #25D366; color: #fff; padding: 1rem 2.5rem;
    text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .whatsapp-btn:hover { background: #1ebe5a; }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    background: #200f04; color: var(--light-sage);
    padding: 2.5rem 5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  }
  .footer-logo img { height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: contain; }
  .footer-tagline {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-style: italic;
    color: var(--soft-tan); font-size: 0.9rem;
  }
  footer span { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); }

  /* ANIMATIONS */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  .hero-left > * { animation: fadeUp 0.65s ease both; }
  .hero-left > *:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.05s; }
  .hero-left > *:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.15s; }
  .hero-left > *:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
  .hero-left > *:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.35s; }
  .hero-left > *:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.45s; }

  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .hero, .why-section, .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-right { height: 55vw; }
    nav { padding: 1rem 1.5rem; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .hero-left, .products-section, .pricing-section, .order-section, .why-section, .contact-section, footer { padding-left: 1.5rem; padding-right: 1.5rem; }
    .products-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .pricing-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .pricing-custom { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .order-steps { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .stitch-divider { padding: 0 1.5rem; }
    .why-stamp { display: none; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Nimi Threads Logo" />
  </div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#shop">Shop</a></li>
    <li><a href="#pricing">Pricing</a></li>
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="https://wa.me/2348167152400" class="nav-order" target="_blank">Order Now</a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <span class="hero-tag">Handmade Crochet Pieces</span>
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Nimi Threads" class="hero-logo" />
    <p class="hero-tagline">Crocheted with <em>passion</em>, made for you.</p>
    <p class="hero-desc">Every stitch from Nimi Threads is lovingly crafted by hand — unique tops, bags, hats and more, tailored to your style. Based in Lokoja / Osara.</p>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="#shop" class="btn-primary">Shop Collection</a>
      <a href="https://wa.me/2348167152400" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">Order on WhatsApp</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-right">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Crochet top by Nimi Threads" />
    <div class="hero-right-overlay">
      <span class="hero-badge">Made with love · Stitched to perfection</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="stitch-divider"><div class="stitch-line"></div><span class="stitch-icon">✦</span><div class="stitch-line"></div></div>

<!-- SHOP -->
<section class="products-section" id="shop">
  <div class="products-header">
    <div>
      <p class="section-label">The Collection</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Our Pieces</h2>
    </div>
    <a href="https://wa.me/2348167152400" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">Custom Order</a>
  </div>
  <div class="products-grid">
    <div class="product-card">
      <div class="product-img">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Crochet Top" />
        <span class="product-badge">Popular</span>
      </div>
      <div class="product-info">
        <p class="product-name">Crochet Tops</p>
        <p class="product-material">Comfortable · Chic · Made to fit you</p>
        <div class="product-footer">
          <span class="product-price">From ₦5,000</span>
          <a href="https://wa.me/2348167152400" class="add-btn" target="_blank">Order Now</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="product-card">
      <div class="product-img">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Crochet Bag" style="object-position: bottom;" />
        <span class="product-badge">New</span>
      </div>
      <div class="product-info">
        <p class="product-name">Bags & Purses</p>
        <p class="product-material">Durable · Handmade · Made with care</p>
        <div class="product-footer">
          <span class="product-price">₦4,000 – ₦10,000</span>
          <a href="https://wa.me/2348167152400" class="add-btn" target="_blank">Order Now</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="product-card">
      <div class="product-img">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Crochet Hat" style="object-position: 80% bottom;" />
      </div>
      <div class="product-info">
        <p class="product-name">Hats & Beanies</p>
        <p class="product-material">Stylish · Comfortable · Perfect for any look</p>
        <div class="product-footer">
          <span class="product-price">Price on request</span>
          <a href="https://wa.me/2348167152400" class="add-btn" target="_blank">Order Now</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="stitch-divider"><div class="stitch-line"></div><span class="stitch-icon">✦</span><div class="stitch-line"></div></div>

<!-- PRICING -->
<section class="pricing-section" id="pricing">
  <p class="section-label">Transparent Pricing</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Price List</h2>
  <div class="pricing-grid">
    <div class="pricing-card">
      <div class="pricing-icon">👚</div>
      <div>
        <p class="pricing-name">Tops</p>
        <p class="pricing-amount">₦5,000+</p>
        <p class="pricing-note">Price varies based on size & design complexity.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pricing-card">
      <div class="pricing-icon">👜</div>
      <div>
        <p class="pricing-name">Bags & Purses</p>
        <p class="pricing-amount">₦4,000 – ₦10,000</p>
        <p class="pricing-note">Depending on size & style chosen.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pricing-card" style="grid-column: 1 / -1;">
      <div class="pricing-icon">🧢</div>
      <div>
        <p class="pricing-name">Hats & Beanies</p>
        <p class="pricing-amount">Price depends on design</p>
        <p class="pricing-note">Reach out via WhatsApp with your design idea and we'll give you a quote.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pricing-custom">
      <div>
        <h3>Custom Orders</h3>
        <p>Want something unique? We create bespoke crochet pieces tailored entirely to your style, colour, and size preference.</p>
        <a href="https://wa.me/2348167152400" class="btn-primary" style="margin-top:1.5rem; display:inline-block;" target="_blank">Chat with Us</a>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p style="font-size:0.72rem; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom:0.8rem;">Final price depends on:</p>
        <ul class="custom-factors">
          <li>Design complexity</li>
          <li>Size of the piece</li>
          <li>Yarn type used</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="stitch-divider"><div class="stitch-line"></div><span class="stitch-icon">✦</span><div class="stitch-line"></div></div>

<!-- ORDER PROCESS -->
<section class="order-section">
  <p class="section-label">How to Order</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Simple as 1, 2, 3</h2>
  <div class="order-steps">
    <div class="order-step">
      <div class="order-step-icon">💬</div>
      <h4>1. Chat on WhatsApp</h4>
      <p>Send your idea, design, size and colour preference to 08167152400.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="order-step">
      <div class="order-step-icon">💳</div>
      <h4>2. Pay 50% Deposit</h4>
      <p>A 50% deposit is required to begin production of your piece.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="order-step">
      <div class="order-step-icon">📦</div>
      <h4>3. Receive in 3–7 Days</h4>
      <p>Your handcrafted piece is completed and delivered to you with neat finishing guaranteed.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="stitch-divider"><div class="stitch-line"></div><span class="stitch-icon">✦</span><div class="stitch-line"></div></div>

<!-- ABOUT / WHY -->
<section class="why-section" id="about">
  <div>
    <p class="section-label">About Nimi Threads</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Every stitch tells a story</h2>
    <div class="features-list">
      <div class="feature-item">
        <span class="feature-num">01</span>
        <div class="feature-text">
          <h4>Handmade with care</h4>
          <p>Every piece is crocheted by hand, ensuring uniqueness and quality in every item that leaves our hands.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-item">
        <span class="feature-num">02</span>
        <div class="feature-text">
          <h4>Unique. Stylish. Timeless.</h4>
          <p>We design crochet pieces that are fashion-forward, comfortable and built to last season after season.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-item">
        <span class="feature-num">03</span>
        <div class="feature-text">
          <h4>Custom orders welcome</h4>
          <p>Have a design in mind? We bring your vision to life — your style, your colours, your size.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="why-image">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Nimi Threads crochet pieces" />
    <div class="why-stamp">
      <span>Made with</span>
      <span>Love ♡</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section class="contact-section" id="contact">
  <p class="section-label">Get in Touch</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Order or Enquire</h2>
  <div class="contact-grid">
    <div class="contact-card">
      <div class="contact-icon">📍</div>
      <div>
        <p class="contact-label">Location</p>
        <p class="contact-value">Lokoja / Osara</p>
        <p class="contact-sub">Proudly handmade for you.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-card">
      <div class="contact-icon">📱</div>
      <div>
        <p class="contact-label">WhatsApp to Order</p>
        <p class="contact-value">08167152400</p>
        <p class="contact-sub">Send us a message anytime.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <a href="https://wa.me/2348167152400" class="whatsapp-btn" target="_blank">💬 &nbsp; WhatsApp Us to Order</a>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Nimi Threads" />
  </div>
  <span class="footer-tagline">"Wear handmade. Support small. Love unique."</span>
  <span>© 2026 Nimi Threads. All rights reserved.</span>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
